## Meeting Purpose

[Getting to know Marcel Santilli and exploring potential advisory or collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel has extensive experience in content marketing, community building, and go-to-market strategies from roles at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and Anthropic.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [He is passionate about helping founders navigate the changing landscape of AI and automation.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [There may be an opportunity for Marcel to advise an AI infrastructure startup like MindsDB that Mayfield has invested in.](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Background

  - [Originally from Brazil, moved to Texas at age 11](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Early career at IBM and HP building content hubs and online communities](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - Employee \#100 at HashiCorp, built growth marketing and go-to-market strategy
  - [Joined Anthropic at $100M ARR with 2 person marketing team, launched major virtual conferences](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

### HashiCorp Experience

  - [Built learn.hashicorp.com to drive self-identification of users](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Focused on practitioner adoption via content, education, community](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Enterprise adoption via account mapping, sales enablement content](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### Anthropic Marketing Strategies

  - [Leveraged founder's persona and connections for events with high-profile speakers](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Virtual conferences with 10K-35K attendees featuring billionaires, tech leaders](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Exclusive dinners and brand association tactics](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Current Work at DeepGram

  - [Programmatically created 3000+ content pages using AI, driving 30x traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1331.0)
  - [Building startup program and community around DeepGram's voice AI products](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Potential Advisory Role

  - [Open to advisory roles leveraging experience in content, community, go-to-market](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Interested in the AI infrastructure and cognitive plumbing space](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Brandon suggested potential intro to MindsDB, an AI startup Mayfield invested in](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Brandon will pass along Marcel's profile to MindsDB if appropriate](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [Stay connected and explore potential advisory opportunities as they arise](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Marcel is open to making introductions from his network as well](https://fathom.video/share/z3_5m4sZffsN3-6-vJh1jyoWWRaCafxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
